title: drosera geniculata
intro: Drosera geniculata, also known as the forked sundew, is a carnivorous plant species belonging to the Droseraceae family. It contains medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves, which are rich in iridoid glycosides and flavonoids, and have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Drosera geniculata include its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, making it useful in relieving respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tincture or infuse in teas, and is also used in some over-the-counter cough medicines to soothe and calm the throat.
